stereotype: «Engine» — encapsulates OperationEstimationModel volatility; pure deterministic in-workflow computation; no I/O; Strategy host for CustomerAppInfrastructure constituent
volatility: OperationEstimationModel — how operating cost is forecasted as a function of usage; two contexts: design-time (declared assumptions → usage→cost curve + payout-vs-shortfall forecast) and op-time (observed telemetry → run-rate + projected monthly cost + what-if curve); Strategy axis: CustomerAppInfrastructure (per-infrastructure cost-Strategy registered behind opaque infrastructureKind discriminator)

ops.signature: estimateForOption(option: ProjectOption, declaredUsage: UsageAssumption, infrastructureKind: InfrastructureKind) → OperationForecast
ops.note: Design-time SDP-review forecast: declared usage assumptions in → UsageCostCurve (projected monthly cost at load multipliers) + PayoutShortfallForecast (expected per-cycle net ± sensitivity band); called directly in-workflow by projectDesignManager; no Activity wrapper

fields.name: Option
fields.note: One option from the SDP review; carries RevenueShareTerm / ComputeCostPricing per D-OE OQ-2/FU-OE-A

fields.name: DeclaredUsage
fields.note: Customer declared usage expectations (DAU, req/min, payload, peak-to-trough, basis)

fields.name: InfrastructureKind
fields.note: Opaque enum discriminator; selects the package-internal cost-Strategy

fields.name: UsageCostCurve
fields.note: Projected monthly cost at discrete load multipliers

fields.name: AssumptionBasis
fields.note: Echoes the input basis so the SDP review can label the forecast

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error — ContractMisuse | UnknownInfrastructure | InternalInvariant (programmer errors only)

ops.signature: projectForOperatedApp(observedUsage: ObservedUsage, infrastructureKind: InfrastructureKind, scaleWhatIfPoints: []ScalePoint) → CostProjection
ops.note: Op-time read-side cost projection: observed telemetry in → currentRunRate + projectedMonthlyCost + scaleWhatIfCurve; called directly in-workflow by operationsManager queryCostProjection; no Activity wrapper; no state mutation

fields.name: ObservedUsage
fields.note: Value snapshot from usageAccess.readRange(operatedAppId, lastCycle) passed in by Manager

fields.name: InfrastructureKind
fields.note: Opaque enum discriminator; selects the cost-Strategy

fields.name: ScaleWhatIfPoints
fields.note: Hypothetical load levels for what-if curve; may be empty

fields.name: CurrentRunRate
fields.note: Extrapolated cost-per-cycle at current observed load

fields.name: ProjectedMonthlyCost
fields.note: Run-rate normalized to a calendar month

fields.name: ScaleWhatIfCurve
fields.note: Projected cost at each requested ScalePoint; current-load point always present

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error — ContractMisuse | UnknownInfrastructure | InternalInvariant (programmer errors only)

dataContracts: UsageAssumption = struct{ ExpectedDailyActiveUsers int; RequestsPerMinute float64; AvgPayloadBytes int; PeakToTroughRatio float64; Basis AssumptionBasis } // Declared | CategoryDefault(category)

ObservedUsage = struct{ OperatedAppID; WindowStart time.Time; WindowEnd time.Time; ComputeUnitSeconds float64; RequestCount int64; StorageBytesMonths float64; EgressBytes float64; ObservedReplicas int } // value passed in by Manager from usageAccess.readRange
ScalePoint = struct{ LoadMultiplier float64 } // > 0; 1.0 == current observed load
InfrastructureKind = int // opaque enum discriminator; InfrastructureKindGoTemporalPostgres = launch set; package-internal Strategy registration on new value
OperationForecast = struct{ UsageCostCurve UsageCostCurve; PayoutVsShortfallForecast PayoutShortfallForecast; AssumptionBasis AssumptionBasis }
UsageCostCurve = struct{ Points []CostCurvePoint } // one per load multiplier; monotonic in LoadMultiplier
CostCurvePoint = struct{ LoadMultiplier float64; ProjectedMonthlyCost Money }
PayoutShortfallForecast = struct{ ExpectedPerCycleNet Money; SensitivityLow Money; SensitivityHigh Money } // signed: positive == payout; negative == shortfall
CostProjection = struct{ CurrentRunRate Money; ProjectedMonthlyCost Money; ScaleWhatIfCurve WhatIfCurve }
WhatIfCurve = struct{ Points []WhatIfPoint } // current-load point always present
WhatIfPoint = struct{ LoadMultiplier float64; ProjectedMonthlyCost Money }
Money = struct{ MinorUnits int64; Currency string } // shared value type; no float
errorModel: framework-go/engine.Error — programmer-error kinds only (no I/O): ContractMisuse (nil option/declaredUsage/observedUsage, nonsensical inputs), UnknownInfrastructure (infrastructureKind not registered; no silent fallback), InternalInvariant (engine-internal invariant violation; panic in test builds). No retryable flag and no Temporal mapping. FU-OE-B: drop InvalidInput kind, fold into ContractMisuse (autoscalerEngine shape — one-line architect amendment, non-blocking).
idempotency: Trivially idempotent — pure deterministic functions; no I/O; no idempotencyKey parameter. Same inputs → same output always. Determinism invariants: no time.Now() reads, no rand, no global mutable state, no env reads at init, no goroutines/channels/syscalls/I/O.

revisions.byActivity: D-OE (Detailed design — operationEstimationEngine); new Engine added when ConstructionEstimationModel re-split into construction-side and operation-side volatilities
revisions.summary: Initial contract: 2 ops (estimateForOption, projectForOperatedApp); one per documented OperationEstimationModel context; infrastructureKind as opaque enum; pure deterministic Engine; cross-Manager consumption (projectDesignManager + operationsManager) documented and sanctioned; 2b waiver justified

APPROVED — FROZEN. 7/9 PASS, 1 WAIVED (2b — endorsed: one model, exactly two volatility contexts; no third inbound edge; §8 rejects collapse-to-1 + 3 speculative third ops), 1 PASS-with-note (2a). OQ-1 2-op waiver endorsed. OQ-2 RevenueShareTerm homing resolved in-contract (value carried by ProjectOption; no Engine→Engine edge). OQ-3 sensitivity band kept on output type. OQ-4 collapse to autoscalerEngine shape (drop InvalidInput → FU-OE-B). OQ-5 signatures ratified; field shape construction-refinable. OQ-6 reuse shared money type (FU-OE-C).
